info.title: Zoho AI Assistant API
info.description:
REST API for Zoho CRM lead retrieval, OAuth management, and OpenAI-powered lead analysis.

## OpenAI Endpoints

Configure `OpenAI:ApiKey` and `OpenAI:Model` in appsettings.json, then:

| Endpoint | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `POST /api/ai/analyze-lead/{leadId}` | Full analysis: summary, next action, email draft, quality score |
| `POST /api/ai/generate-email/{leadId}` | Professional follow-up email only |
| `POST /api/ai/generate-summary/{leadId}` | Lead summary only |

## Complete OAuth Workflow

Follow these steps in order to authenticate with Zoho CRM via Swagger:

| Step | Action | Endpoint |
|------|--------|----------|
| **1** | Generate the Zoho authorization URL | `GET /api/oauth/authorize` |
| **2** | Open `authorizationUrl` in a browser and sign in to Zoho | *(browser)* |
| **3** | After consent, copy the `code` parameter from the redirect URL | *(browser redirect)* |
| **4** | Exchange the code for access + refresh tokens | `GET /api/oauth/callback?code={code}` |
| **5** | Verify tokens are stored (refresh token saved to `Data/zoho-tokens.json`) | `GET /api/oauth/tokens` |
| **6** | Test lead retrieval | `GET /api/leads/test` |

### Optional steps

- **Manual refresh:** `POST /api/oauth/refresh` — forces a new access token.
- **Health check:** `GET /api/health/zoho` — verifies OAuth + CRM connectivity.
- **Full leads list:** `GET /api/leads` — returns the first page of all leads.

### Prerequisites

1. Set `Zoho:ClientId` and `Zoho:ClientSecret` in `appsettings.json`.
2. Register redirect URI `http://localhost:5000/api/oauth/callback` in the [Zoho API Console](https://api-console.zoho.in/).
3. Run the app on port 5000 (`dotnet run`).

### Automatic token refresh

Access tokens expire after ~1 hour. All CRM endpoints automatically refresh the token
using the stored refresh token when needed. Failed requests due to 401 are retried once.

post.summary: Analyzes a Zoho CRM lead using OpenAI and returns structured JSON insights.
post.description:
**Workflow**
            
1. Fetches the lead from Zoho CRM (all fields + related Notes).
2. Extracts Lead Name, Company, Email, Phone, Description, and Notes.
3. Sends the context to OpenAI with a structured analysis prompt.
4. Returns JSON containing summary, next action, email draft, and quality score.
            
**Example response**
```json
{
  "leadId": "123456789",
  "leadName": "Jane Doe",
  "company": "Acme Corp",
  "leadSummary": "...",
  "recommendedNextAction": "...",
  "followUpEmailDraft": "...",
  "leadQualityScore": 82,
  "model": "gpt-4o-mini"
}
```
            
Configure `OpenAI:ApiKey` and `OpenAI:Model` in appsettings.json before calling.

requestBody.description: Optional additional context for the AI prompt.

404.description: Lead not found in Zoho CRM.

500.description: OpenAI API key missing from configuration.

502.description: OpenAI or Zoho API returned an error.

post.summary: Generates a professional sales follow-up email for a Zoho CRM lead.
post.description:
Fetches lead context from Zoho CRM and returns only the email draft.
            
**Example response**
```json
{
  "leadId": "123456789",
  "leadName": "Jane Doe",
  "emailDraft": "Subject: Following up on our conversation...",
  "model": "gpt-4o-mini"
}
```

requestBody.description: Optional additional context for the AI prompt.

404.description: Lead not found in Zoho CRM.

502.description: OpenAI or Zoho API returned an error.

post.summary: Generates a concise AI summary for a Zoho CRM lead.
post.description:
Fetches lead context from Zoho CRM and returns only the summary text.
            
**Example response**
```json
{
  "leadId": "123456789",
  "leadName": "Jane Doe",
  "summary": "High-intent inbound lead from Acme Corp...",
  "model": "gpt-4o-mini"
}
```

requestBody.description: Optional additional context for the AI prompt.

404.description: Lead not found in Zoho CRM.

502.description: OpenAI or Zoho API returned an error.

get.summary: Verifies Zoho OAuth and CRM API connectivity.
get.description:
Performs a live check:
1. Obtains a valid access token (auto-refreshes if expired).
2. Calls `GET /crm/v7/Leads?per_page=1` on Zoho CRM.
3. Returns success or failure with diagnostic details.
            
Example success response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Zoho OAuth and CRM API are working correctly.",
  "accessTokenGenerated": true,
  "crmApiReachable": true,
  "httpStatusCode": 200,
  "checkedAtUtc": "2026-06-11T10:00:00+00:00"
}
```

200.description: Health check completed (inspect `success` field for pass/fail).

get.summary: Step 6 — Returns the first 5 leads from Zoho CRM (quick test after OAuth).
get.description:
**OAuth Workflow — Step 6**
            
After completing OAuth and storing the refresh token, call this endpoint to verify
lead retrieval. Returns at most 5 leads. Access tokens are refreshed automatically
if expired.
            
Example response:
```json
{
  "leads": [
    { "id": "123456789", "firstName": "Jane", "lastName": "Doe", "email": "jane@example.com" }
  ],
  "count": 5,
  "page": 1,
  "perPage": 5,
  "moreRecords": true
}
```

401.description: OAuth not configured — complete the OAuth flow first.

502.description: Zoho CRM API returned an error.

get.summary: Returns all leads from Zoho CRM (first page).
get.description: Retrieves the first page of leads. Access tokens are refreshed automatically when expired.

502.description: Zoho CRM API returned an error.

get.summary: Returns a single lead by Zoho record ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Zoho CRM Lead record ID (numeric string).

schema.description: A Zoho Lead record with all CRM fields returned as a flat key/value map (Zoho API names).

404.description: Lead not found in Zoho CRM.

502.description: Zoho CRM API returned an error.

get.summary: Step 1 — Generate the Zoho OAuth authorization URL.
get.description:
**OAuth Workflow — Step 1**
            
Call this endpoint to receive a Zoho authorization URL. Open the `authorizationUrl`
value in a browser, sign in to Zoho, and approve access.
            
Example response:
```json
{
  "authorizationUrl": "https://accounts.zoho.in/oauth/v2/auth?scope=...",
  "redirectUri": "http://localhost:5000/api/oauth/callback",
  "scopes": "ZohoCRM.modules.leads.READ,...",
  "instructions": "Open AuthorizationUrl in a browser..."
}
```

500.description: Client ID or Client Secret is missing from configuration.

get.summary: Step 4 — Exchange the authorization code for access and refresh tokens.
get.description:
**OAuth Workflow — Step 4**
            
After signing in to Zoho (Step 2), the browser is redirected to the callback URL with a
`code` query parameter (Step 3). Pass that code here to obtain and store tokens.
            
Example callback URL from the browser:
```
http://localhost:5000/api/oauth/callback?code=1000.abc123.xyz&location=in
```
            
Example request:
```
GET /api/oauth/callback?code=1000.abc123.xyz
```
            
On success, the refresh token is saved to `Data/zoho-tokens.json` (Step 5).

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Authorization code from the Zoho redirect URL (expires in ~60 seconds).

400.description: Authorization code is missing or invalid.

502.description: Zoho token endpoint returned an error.

get.summary: Returns the current OAuth token status (access token, refresh token, expiry).
get.description:
Example response:
```json
{
  "accessToken": "1000.xxxxx",
  "refreshToken": "1000.yyyyy",
  "expiresAtUtc": "2026-06-11T12:00:00+00:00",
  "isAccessTokenValid": true,
  "hasRefreshToken": true,
  "message": "Access token is valid."
}
```

post.summary: Step 5 — Force-refresh the access token using the stored refresh token.
post.description:
**OAuth Workflow — Step 5 (optional manual refresh)**
            
Generates a new access token from the stored refresh token. The Leads API also refreshes
automatically when the access token expires.
            
Example response:
```json
{
  "accessToken": "1000.newtoken",
  "refreshToken": "1000.yyyyy",
  "expiresAtUtc": "2026-06-11T13:00:00+00:00",
  "isAccessTokenValid": true,
  "hasRefreshToken": true,
  "message": "Access token is valid."
}
```

401.description: No refresh token available — complete OAuth flow first.

502.description: Zoho token endpoint returned an error.

additionalContext.description: Extra instructions or context appended to the AI prompt.

LeadAnalysisRequest.description: Optional input for AI lead analysis endpoints.

LeadAnalysisResponse.description: Structured AI analysis returned by POST /api/ai/analyze-lead/{leadId}.

authorizationUrl.description: Full Zoho authorization URL — open in a browser to sign in.

instructions.description: Human-readable next steps for the OAuth workflow.

redirectUri.description: Redirect URI embedded in the authorization URL (must match Zoho client settings).

OAuthCallbackResultDto.description: Result of GET /api/oauth/callback after exchanging the authorization code.

items.description: A Zoho Lead record with all CRM fields returned as a flat key/value map (Zoho API names).

ZohoLeadListResponseDto.description: Paginated list response returned by GET /api/leads.

ZohoTokenStatusDto.description: Token status returned by GET /api/oauth/tokens and POST /api/oauth/refresh.
